description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ${IMAGE} Docker image with GIT_DEPTH and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY variables and four stages: build, test, coverage, and deploy. In the test stage add an archive job that runs `cd ..`, `apt-get update && apt-get install zip -y`, `zip -r extensions.zip $CI_PROJECT_NAME -x $CI_PROJECT_NAME/tests/* -x $CI_PROJECT_NAME/.git/*`, and `mv extensions.zip $CI_PROJECT_NAME/extensions.zip`, publishing the resulting extensions.zip as an artifact; add a codestyle:ci job that runs `source /root/pyenv-init`, `pyenv shell 3.11.0`, `pip install ruff`, and `ruff format --check --diff`; add a mypy job that runs `source /root/pyenv-init`, `pyenv shell 3.11.0`, `pip install mypy`, and `mypy inkex --ignore-missing-imports`; and add a sphinx job that runs `source /root/pyenv-init`, `pyenv shell 3.11.0`, `python -m pip install poetry-plugin-export`, `poetry install`, `poetry run sphinx-apidoc -e -P -o docs/source/ inkex */deprecated.py`, `cd docs`, `poetry run make html`, and an echo of the documentation URL, storing the build/html/ directory as an artifact. Also in the test stage define parallel test:linux jobs for PYTHON_VER 3.10,3.11,3.12,3.13 that run `source /root/pyenv-init`, `pyenv shell ${PYTHON_VER}.0`, and `tox -e py${PYTHON_VER//.}-normal-linux` while inheriting the .artifacts definition, and parallel test:windows jobs for PYTHON_VER 3.11,3.12 that run `choco install python --version "$Env:PYTHON_VER.0" -y -f --no-progress`, adjust PATH, set `PYTHON_KEYRING_BACKEND`, import Chocolatey profile, `refreshenv`, upgrade pip, install `tox<4.0`, `poetry`, `tox-poetry`, `poetry-plugin-export`, and execute `tox -e $("py"+$Env:PYTHON_VER.Replace(".", "")+"-normal-win")`, also inheriting .artifacts and tagged with saas-windows-medium-amd64. In the coverage stage add a test:coverage job that always runs, depends on all test:linux and test:windows jobs, runs `source /root/pyenv-init`, `pyenv shell 3.11.0`, `pip install coverage`, combines coverage files with `coverage3 combine .coverage-*`, reports with `coverage3 report -m --precision=2`, creates HTML with `coverage3 html --ignore-errors --title="Coverage for Inkscape Extensions (${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} branch)"`, echoes the HTML link, installs `pylint==2.17.4` and runs `python3 tests/add_pylint.py htmlcov/index.html`, installs `anybadge`, extracts the pylint score and creates a badge via `anybadge -l pylint -v $pylintscore -f htmlcov/pylint.svg 6=red 8=orange 9=yellow 10=green`, and publishes the htmlcov/ directory as an artifact with a coverage regex. Finally, in the deploy stage add a pages job that only runs on the master@inkscape/extensions branch, always runs, creates a public directory, copies htmlcov to public/coverage and build/html to public/documentation if they exist, sources pyenv, selects Python 3.11.0, runs `bash docs/poetry.sh > public/python-dependencies.txt`, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
